statements.sql: select `benefits`.*, `job_benefit`.`job_id` as `pivot_job_id`, `job_benefit`.`benefit_id` as `pivot_benefit_id` from `benefits` inner join `job_benefit` on `benefits`.`id` = `job_benefit`.`benefit_id` where `job_benefit`.`job_id` in (1309)
select `tags`.*, `job_tag`.`job_id` as `pivot_job_id`, `job_tag`.`tag_id` as `pivot_tag_id` from `tags` inner join `job_tag` on `tags`.`id` = `job_tag`.`tag_id` where `job_tag`.`job_id` in (1309)

select `company_questions`.*, `company_question_job`.`job_id` as `pivot_job_id`, `company_question_job`.`company_question_id` as `pivot_company_question_id` from `company_questions` inner join `company_question_job` on `company_questions`.`id` = `company_question_job`.`company_question_id` where `company_question_job`.`job_id` in (1309)

select `id`, (select count(*) from `candidates` inner join `bookmark_candidate_job` on `candidates`.`id` = `bookmark_candidate_job`.`candidate_id` where `jobs`.`id` = `bookmark_candidate_job`.`job_id`) as `bookmark_jobs_count`, (select count(*) from `candidates` inner join `applied_jobs` on `candidates`.`id` = `applied_jobs`.`candidate_id` where `jobs`.`id` = `applied_jobs`.`job_id`) as `applied_jobs_count`, (select count(*) from `candidates` inner join `bookmark_candidate_job` on `candidates`.`id` = `bookmark_candidate_job`.`candidate_id` where `jobs`.`id` = `bookmark_candidate_job`.`job_id` and `candidate_id` = '') as `bookmarked`, (select count(*) from `candidates` inner join `applied_jobs` on `candidates`.`id` = `applied_jobs`.`candidate_id` where `jobs`.`id` = `applied_jobs`.`job_id` and `candidate_id` = '') as `applied` from `jobs` where `jobs`.`id` in (1309)

select `jobs`.*, (select count(*) from `candidates` inner join `bookmark_candidate_job` on `candidates`.`id` = `bookmark_candidate_job`.`candidate_id` where `jobs`.`id` = `bookmark_candidate_job`.`job_id`) as `bookmark_jobs_count`, (select count(*) from `candidates` inner join `bookmark_candidate_job` on `candidates`.`id` = `bookmark_candidate_job`.`candidate_id` where `jobs`.`id` = `bookmark_candidate_job`.`job_id` and `candidate_id` = '') as `bookmarked` from `jobs` where `waiting_for_edit_approval` = 0 and `status` = 'active' and `id` != 1309 and `category_id` = 4 order by `created_at` desc limit 18

select `benefits`.*, `job_benefit`.`job_id` as `pivot_job_id`, `job_benefit`.`benefit_id` as `pivot_benefit_id` from `benefits` inner join `job_benefit` on `benefits`.`id` = `job_benefit`.`benefit_id` where `job_benefit`.`job_id` in (1199, 1201, 1215, 1217, 1218, 1229, 1230, 1238, 1239, 1244, 1252, 1258, 1262, 1273, 1286, 1293, 1294, 1296)

select `tags`.*, `job_tag`.`job_id` as `pivot_job_id`, `job_tag`.`tag_id` as `pivot_tag_id` from `tags` inner join `job_tag` on `tags`.`id` = `job_tag`.`tag_id` where `job_tag`.`job_id` in (1199, 1201, 1215, 1217, 1218, 1229, 1230, 1238, 1239, 1244, 1252, 1258, 1262, 1273, 1286, 1293, 1294, 1296)

select `company_questions`.*, `company_question_job`.`job_id` as `pivot_job_id`, `company_question_job`.`company_question_id` as `pivot_company_question_id` from `company_questions` inner join `company_question_job` on `company_questions`.`id` = `company_question_job`.`company_question_id` where `company_question_job`.`job_id` in (1199, 1201, 1215, 1217, 1218, 1229, 1230, 1238, 1239, 1244, 1252, 1258, 1262, 1273, 1286, 1293, 1294, 1296)

select `company_questions`.*, `company_question_job`.`job_id` as `pivot_job_id`, `company_question_job`.`company_question_id` as `pivot_company_question_id` from `company_questions` inner join `company_question_job` on `company_questions`.`id` = `company_question_job`.`company_question_id` where `company_question_job`.`job_id` in (1201)
